page_description: Discover the legacy and vision behind the sanctuary of elite hospitality in Florianópolis.
hero_subtitle: Founded on the pillars of exclusivity and the vibrant energy of the sea, our hotel is more than a destination; it is a curated refuge for the global traveler.

luxury_pillar.title: Boutique Luxury
luxury_pillar.description: A sophisticated atmosphere designed to celebrate diversity and high-end comfort in every detail.

comfort_pillar.title: Absolute Refuge
comfort_pillar.description: Modern suites integrated with smart technology to ensure peace and rest in the heart of Canasvieiras.

service_pillar.title: Elite Concierge
service_pillar.description: Our dedicated team anticipates your needs, ensuring an impeccable and personalized stay 24/7.
